description: The immutable delegation frame for AI agents: gate any sensitive action, human-in-the-loop.
name: io.github.almega-ai/almega-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Storage backend: 'memory' (default, zero-config) or 'stripe' (real Stripe Issuing test-mode virtual cards, no real money).
environmentVariables.name: ALMEGA_BACKEND

environmentVariables.description: Stripe TEST secret key (sk_test_...). Required only when ALMEGA_BACKEND=stripe. Almega refuses live keys.
environmentVariables.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY

title: Almega
